title: [security] EDHOC/OSCORE key derivation and zeroization gaps post-fix
description: Commits ed7ed668b/11d4a7a32 updated export_context to use RFC labels "7","10","0","1" and Zeroizing (good), but test vectors changed, intermediate prk copies in state structs not always Zeroizing-wrapped, Zeroize impls reset keys to zeroed SigningKey. No constant-time audit for parsing/KDF paths. MIC/sig verification in finish_process_message_2/3 relies on transcript hashes that could be malleable if CBOR encoding inconsistent. Schnorr48 link layer not integrated here. P0 bug.
